    Technical source data

    MissionTypes:CjDPx9RfQEy7G04J4_T6Yg

    labelThe New Frontier: Part 4 (0-0)
    titleThe New Frontier: Part 4
    majorTypestatic
    nextMissionpeYYP6wl3keeALB4kKXY6g
    dropJebQvxhDpUuTv0IOfiNEZQ
    keyCjDPx9RfQEy7G04J4_T6Yg
    descriptionTalk to and assist Agent Ace at the upgrade station.
    mustBeInorderYes
    minLvl0
    completeDescriptionAgent Ace: “Ah… we have a new fellow in our ranks. Do you even know what you are up against? …. I thought so. To achieve anything meningful we need to use guerilla tactics, we can’t just attack the Nezerians head on, they are much to powerful for that. Instead we have to pick them off one by one before we can strike against one of their battle stations. Also, they have polyhedric coating that gives them full resistance against corrosive weapons and a strong kinetic plating, so I would strongly advice you to use energy weapons. You can start by attacking a few Nezerian fighters at the outer region. You should be familiar with them already so they should be an easy target.”
    addedBodies["S_Y2a0T06EuThed-RTg8IQ"]
    tableMissionTypes
    availableYes
    typetransport
    maxLvl0
